name: Fudgy Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt margarine or butter with sweetened condensed milk until heated through.
3. Remove from heat; stir in remaining ingredients. Pour into prepared pie crust.
4. Bake 40 to 45 minutes or until center is set. Cool slightly.
5. Serve warm or chilled. Garnish with whipped cream or ice cream, if desired.
6. Refrigerate leftovers.
You can also use the premelted chocolate called choco bake instead of unsweetened squares.
